title: codereview-P1: format_version=2 update requires schema.json const update and ccp vector schema defs
description: Changing FORMAT_VERSION without updating schema.json will cause validation failures in test suite. Also, ccp15 and ccp_load_balancing vectors not covered in schema oneOf. Add definitions for them in v2. Tagged codereview per task.
close_reason: Fixed: updated schema.json with format_version=2 support + ccp15/ccp16 defs (oneOf fixed to avoid overlap validation error); generate.py=2; test_vectors.py asserts updated to 2 + rpl_messages.json; Python future import ordering fixed for rpl/messages.py; vector tests pass (130/130); lora_l2.c CCA with IS_ENABLED read, lora_cad(), busy abort via -EBUSY + modem_mutex already present and correct (no further changes); Zephyr native_sim builds clean, no new issues after 3 codereview passes (correctness/security/robustness all clean, no open findings)
